attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
(SELECT ITEM_KEY FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION_ADJ_PROD')  PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(STK_RATIO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, -999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
B.CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
SOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
( DR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE * RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT  ) * COALESCE( STK_RATIO.GL_STK_RATIO, 1 )   AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
( DR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE * RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT  ) * COALESCE( STK_RATIO.GL_STK_RATIO, 1 )   AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT , 
COALESCE( OPU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE, 'UNKNOWN' ) OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
( D.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + D.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
B.GL_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN A 
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ,GL_DTM, A.CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE A, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT B WHERE A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = B.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY  AND  B.JOURNAL_CATEGORY_CD = 'MANUAL ADJUSTMENTS' AND B.JOURNAL_SOURCE_NAME = 'CCRM') B ON B.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT C ON B.CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY = C.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH D ON C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     IN ( '42750' , '42755' ) AND CAST(B.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN D.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND D.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND ( D.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + D.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ) =(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS SOB ON SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE DR ON SOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = DR.SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE AND DR.SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' AND DR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE = CAST(B.GL_DTM AS DATE) AND DR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate'
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OPU ON OPU.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = C.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND OPU.BK_COMPANY_CODE  = C.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_GL_RAE_PROFILE_STK_RATIO STK_RATIO ON STK_RATIO.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY=A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY
WHERE  A.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y' 
UNION ALL 
SELECT
A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
(SELECT ITEM_KEY FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION_ADJ_PROD') PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(STK_RATIO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, -999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
B.DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
SOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
( DR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE * RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT  * (-1) ) * COALESCE( STK_RATIO.GL_STK_RATIO, 1 )   AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
( DR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE * RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT  * (-1) ) * COALESCE( STK_RATIO.GL_STK_RATIO, 1 )  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT , 
COALESCE( OPU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE, 'UNKNOWN' ) OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
( D.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + D.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
B.GL_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN A
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ,GL_DTM, A.DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE A,  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT B WHERE A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = B.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY AND  B.JOURNAL_CATEGORY_CD = 'MANUAL ADJUSTMENTS' AND B.JOURNAL_SOURCE_NAME = 'CCRM') B ON B.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT C ON B.DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY = C.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH D ON C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     IN ( '42750' , '42755' ) AND CAST(B.GL_DTM AS DATE) BETWEEN D.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND D.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND (D.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+D.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT )  = (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS SOB ON SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE DR ON SOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = DR.SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE AND DR.SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' AND DR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE = CAST(B.GL_DTM AS DATE) AND DR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate'
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OPU ON OPU.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = C.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND OPU.BK_COMPANY_CODE  = C.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
LEFT JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_GL_RAE_PROFILE_STK_RATIO STK_RATIO ON STK_RATIO.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY=A.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY
WHERE  A.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y'

SELECT 
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY ,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
AMOUNT ,
SUM(AMOUNT) OVER ( PARTITION BY ( RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY ) ) TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT ,
CASE WHEN TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT = 0 THEN 0 
ELSE AMOUNT/TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT 
END RATIO
FROM 
( 
SELECT 
GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
NCP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM( ZEROIFNULL( SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) )  AMOUNT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN GLD

/* commented  as part of TD performance recommendation */
 /*  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SCH
ON ( SCH.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY 
OR SCH.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY )  */ 

/* Below join has been added as per recommendation from TD Performance team */
INNER JOIN (SELECT RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY, SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
            FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE 
            UNION ALL
    SELECT RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY  RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY, SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE 
    where  RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY<>RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY
    )SCH
 ON ( SCH.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY)  


INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT RA 
ON RA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SCH.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
/*prbobba : Q3FY14 SAAS*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON RA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT  
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY /*prbobba : Q3FY14 SAAS*/ 
INNER JOIN ( 
SELECT * 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS MA 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY RAE_ADJ_ID 
ORDER BY RAE_ADJ_ID DESC) = 1) MA 
ON MA.RAE_ADJ_ID = RA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT NMA 
ON NMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = MA.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_PROFILE NCP 
ON NCP.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT = NMA.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT
WHERE RA.JOURNAL_CATEGORY_CD = 'MANUAL ADJUSTMENTS'
AND RA.JOURNAL_SOURCE_NAME = 'CCRM'
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/
)  /*prbobba : Q3FY14 SAAS*/
AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN  ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','OM-FBINV') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
	 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
	 ) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
GROUP BY 1, 2  ) GL_STK_LINK

/*prbobba : Below UNION ALL for Q3FY14 SAAS*/ 
UNION ALL 

SELECT 
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY ,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
AMOUNT ,
SUM(AMOUNT) OVER ( PARTITION BY ( RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY ) ) TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT ,
CASE WHEN TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT = 0 THEN 0 
ELSE AMOUNT/TOTAL_GL_AMOUNT 
END RATIO
FROM 
( 
SELECT 
GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM( ZEROIFNULL( SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) )  AMOUNT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN GLD

/* commented  as part of TD performance recommendation */
 /*  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SCH
ON ( SCH.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY 
OR SCH.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY )  */ 

/* Below join has been added as per recommendation from TD Performance team */
INNER JOIN (SELECT RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY, SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
            FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE 
            UNION ALL
    SELECT RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY  RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY, SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE 
    where  RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY<>RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY
    )SCH
 ON ( SCH.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY = GLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY) 


INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT RA 
ON RA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SCH.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON RA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT  
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
ON (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME = ( CASE WHEN NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME=STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME THEN STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME ELSE 'UNITED STATES' END) 
INNER JOIN ( 
SELECT * 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS MA 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY RAE_ADJ_ID 
ORDER BY RAE_ADJ_ID DESC) = 1) MA 
ON MA.RAE_ADJ_ID = RA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT NMA 
ON NMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = MA.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_PROFILE NCP 
ON NCP.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT = NMA.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT
WHERE RA.JOURNAL_CATEGORY_CD = 'MANUAL ADJUSTMENTS'
AND RA.JOURNAL_SOURCE_NAME = 'CCRM'
AND (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/
) 
OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
)
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
GROUP BY 1, 2  ) GL_STK_LINK_WBX

SELECT
( SELECT MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ ) , /* knarlapu: Max Key from WORK table */
FISCAL_MONTH_ID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS

SELECT 
(RANK() OVER( ORDER BY      
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY
,REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
/*,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD*/
/*,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD*/
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,GL_POSTED_DTM ) + COALESCE( WIGL_REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,0) ) DV_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
-999 END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 -9999 DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN'   SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)           BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)            BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV_MEASURE.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)       DD_GL_DATETIME,
NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  DV_FISCAL_DT ,
REV_MEASURE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL  DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AR_TRX_DATETIME ,
'IND_ADJ' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
'UNKWOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
'Y'  DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
REV_MEASURE.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
0   DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
0   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM  ,
0 DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
REV_MEASURE.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
0    DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
0    DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER              , 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME     ,     
'GL ADJUSTMENTS AS SUBSCRIPTION' BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
'REVENUE' BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE(FORMAT 'YY/MM/DD'  ) AS  GL_DT ,
NULL BK_SS_CD ,                        
0 DV_EXTENDED_QTY    ,              
0 GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ,      
0 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,    
REV_MEASURE.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,         
NULL ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD      ,           
NULL TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,  
NULL WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,     
DATE TRANSACTION_DT,
REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM   ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT , /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
'UNKNOWN' AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
'I'    ACTION_CODE,
'I'    DML_TYPE,
REV_MEASURE.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N' ), /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, 'N')AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */    
COALESCE((CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END),'N') , /* RO proj, Q3FY17  16th March release*/
RFDP.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_ASS_MA  REV_MEASURE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REVENUE_KEY_CNTL WIGL_REV 
ON WIGL_REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT = REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
ON NFM.DV_CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'
 /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17    START*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDP
ON RFDP.CALENDAR_DATE=COALESCE(CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM < RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
WHEN REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM IS NOT NULL AND REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM > RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
ELSE Cast(REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE) END ,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP WHERE BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD='STANDALONE') OMAP
ON OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
AND OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY
 /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17    END*/
